problem.title: Implement strStr()
problem.description: Implement strStr(). Return the index of the first occurrence of needle in haystack, or -1 if needle is not part of haystack.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – KMP Algorithm
solutions.description: The Knuth-Morris-Pratt algorithm preprocesses the needle into a Longest Proper Prefix-Suffix (LPS) array that encodes how far back the pattern pointer can jump on a mismatch without re-examining haystack characters. During the main scan, a mismatch causes the pattern pointer to fall back to lps[j-1] instead of restarting from zero, enabling the search to run in O(m+n) time rather than O(m*n). The key insight is that the LPS array captures all self-overlapping prefixes of the pattern, eliminating redundant comparisons.
